data.cheatsheetContent:
Decide whether source law A ({{ equation1 }}) implies target law B ({{ equation2 }}) over all magmas (binary op `*`). Follow this protocol exactly.
  
MODE:single-problem;rule-first;stop-on-match;default=F
INPUT:A=equation1;B=equation2
NORM:
- for collapse on bare A: put lone var on left; rename it x; rename others by first appearance; keep full bracketing
- for source-form checks: normalize A by first appearance with full bracketing
FEAT:
- E:{size,vars,imb,bare,LP,RP,SET,XOR,AB,UT}
- bare(A):{rhsVars,rhsTotals,Lx,Rx,xTop,square,topShape,xOcc,bn}
- B.leftBare := B is bare with left side x and right side x*(...)
EVAL:
- LP: every product -> leftmost variable
- RP: every product -> rightmost variable
- CP: every non-variable product -> c; variable stays itself

[L0 collapse]
R0 if A.bn='x=(x*(y*(z*(x*y))))' -> EVAL(LP)!
R1 if A.bn='x=(x*((y*z)*(z*z)))' -> EVAL(LP)!
R2 if A.bn='x=((((y*z)*x)*z)*x)' -> EVAL(RP)!

[L0B contradiction]
R3 if A.src in {
'x=((((y*x)*x)*x)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*x)*y)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*x)*z)*w)',
'x=((((y*x)*x)*z)*y)',
'x=((((y*x)*x)*z)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*y)*x)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*y)*y)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*y)*z)*w)',
'x=((((y*x)*y)*z)*y)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*w)*u)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*w)*w)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*w)*y)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*w)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*x)*w)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*x)*y)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*x)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*y)*w)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*y)*y)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*y)*z)',
'x=((((y*x)*z)*z)*w)'
} -> T!

[L2 separator]
R4 if A.LP & !B.LP -> F!
R5 if A.RP & !B.RP -> F!
R6 if A.SET & !B.SET -> F!
R7 if A.XOR & !B.XOR -> F!
R8 if A.AB & !B.AB -> F!

[L3 guard]
R9 if !A.bare & B.bare & B.size==A.size -> F!

[L4 structural]
R10 if A.bare & A.vars>=4 & A.UT -> T!
R11 if A.bare & A.vars>=5 & B.size>A.size -> T!
R12 if A.bare & B.vars>=4 & B.vars<=A.vars-2 -> T!
R13 if !B.bare & A.vars>=5 & B.size>A.size -> T!

[DEFAULT]
R14 -> F!

OUTPUT:
- VERDICT: TRUE|FALSE
- REASONING: list fired rule and key feature values
- PROOF: non-empty only if TRUE
- COUNTEREXAMPLE: non-empty only if FALSE
